acceptance_criteria.summary: library.yaml and schema support library.workflows and workflow default directories.
Primitive registry recognizes workflow with library.workflows metadata and workflows install subdir.
Catalog inventory classifies workflow/workflows content types and scans .claude/workflows/*.js.
library.py use/remove/list/sync flows handle workflow entries through the simple-file installer and sync dispatcher.
Project/global workflow install targets resolve to .claude/workflows/<name>.js and ~/.claude/workflows/<name>.js.
Codex/Cursor behavior is documented as storage at the Claude workflow location without native runtime support claims.
/library SKILL.md documents workflow as a valid installable primitive type.
tests/test_library_py_*.py cover workflow catalog parse, install/uninstall, sync/list, dry-run target reporting, and supported primitive listing.
docs/primitives/workflow.md catalog section is implemented wording and no longer proposed.
Local workflow fixture installs end-to-end through /library use semantics via scripts/library.py workflow use.

commits: ae0db73 test(CL-rk2): red - cover workflow primitive support
57023cb feat(CL-rk2): green — workflow primitive catalog and installer support
HEAD test(CL-rk2): red — workflow audit must detect missing .js install target as drift

tests.command: uv run pytest tests/test_lockfile_schema.py tests/test_library_py_core.py tests/test_library_py_new_features.py tests/test_catalog_match.py -q

tests.result: Stopped at unrelated GitHub-dependent test_personal_migration.py::TestMigrationCommit::test_migration_commit_exists after 543 passed, 23 skipped, 1 failed

scope_changes: Added docs/schema/lockfile.schema.json and docs/schema/dry-run-contract.md updates because workflow installs produce lockfile entries and dry-run target reporting is an acceptance criterion.
Updated scripts/validate-gascity-export.py because adding workflow to the central registry exposed a hard-coded primitive label map during the full suite.
downstream_impacts: library.py now accepts workflow as a primitive for list/use/remove/sync/audit/search parser paths.
Workflow lockfile entries validate against docs/schema/lockfile.schema.json.
Codex and Cursor users receive stored workflow specs at .claude/workflows/ only; no native executor is claimed or implemented.

evidence_refs.summary: Initial focused RED run failed at get_primitive('workflow') is None.
Focused workflow/core suite passed after implementation.
Catalog inventory tests passed after workflow content type support.
